## Source: amazon-inspector (15f50509d5d9110a7233db4ed683100cc33c07a09055d93d32ed8f057a34ae3f)
The package stacks-editor was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (1a6ea6b9be40bdfc9059c0960297c393a8314a45445dd8fcd42ced99521cee4d)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'stacks-editor' @ 1.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
